summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing completed for Zero to AI Genesis interactive frontend. All major features work excellently including 8-season navigation, episode expansions, React Flow diagrams, and responsive design.

design_issues.issue: Mobile menu toggle not visible in tablet view (768px) - minor responsive behavior

passed_tests: Home page loads with all sections (hero, navbar, roadmap, seasons, setup, equations, structure)
All 8 season cards (S0-S7) visible and clickable
Navigation to all season pages /season/0 through /season/7 works correctly
Episode accordion expansion shows description, equations, concepts, React Flow diagrams
React Flow diagrams are fully interactive (zoom, pan, drag controls)
Back to Home and Prev/Next season navigation functional
Navbar sticky behavior works across all pages
Roadmap timeline with all season links functional
Multiple episodes can be expanded simultaneously
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
